book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should be in the north
The hotel should have a star of 4
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 5 people and 4 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called la margherita
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 20:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
